rp_scale: each RP bonus is dimensionless multiplier; higher = stronger n6-closeness anchor
synthesis_note: anima documents sigma(6)=12 faction metrics (faction_entropy only) with no named 13-faction RP table. Synthesized from n6 invariants: tau=4, sigma=12, phi=2, sopfr=5, j2=24, mu=1, n=6, derived ratios (sigma+mu=13, sigma-mu=11, sigma-tau=8, sigma-sopfr=7, sigma-phi=10, sigma*phi=24, 2^(sigma+mu)=8192) scaled by anima seed numerics.

factions.name: SIGMA_DIVISOR
factions.description: Sum-of-divisors faction. n=6 perfect number anchor. Divisors {1,2,3,6} sum = 12.

factions.name: PHI_TOTIENT
factions.description: Euler totient faction. Coprime residues {1,5} count = 2. MoE top-k phi/tau = 1/2.

factions.name: SOPFR_PRIME
factions.description: Prime-factor-sum faction. Bridges n=6 to prime basis (2,3).

factions.name: JORDAN_J2
factions.description: Jordan totient faction. Leech lattice dim = sigma*phi = 24. Core theorem sigma*phi = n*tau.

factions.name: MOBIUS_MU
factions.description: Mobius faction. Squarefree 2-prime sign. Twin prime anchor sigma-mu=11, sigma+mu=13.

factions.name: IDENTITY_N
factions.description: Identity faction. First perfect number. Baseline of all invariants.

factions.name: SIGMA_MINUS_TAU
factions.description: Byte-period faction. SHA-256 word byte, Bott period. Crypto/CS anchor.

factions.name: SIGMA_MINUS_SOPFR
factions.description: OSI-layer faction. IPv6 = 2^7, AES = 2^7, 7 OSI layers. Network/crypto anchor.

factions.name: SIGMA_MINUS_PHI
factions.description: Decimal faction. 1/(sigma-phi) = 0.1 universal regularization (weight decay, DPO beta).

factions.name: SIGMA_MINUS_MU
factions.description: RSA-state faction. RSA = 2^11, TCP states, M-theory dim. Twin prime lower pair.

factions.name: SIGMA_PLUS_MU
factions.description: DNS-root faction. 13 DNS root servers, MI300X total dies. The 13th cardinal itself.

factions.name: SIGMA_PHI_CORE
factions.description: Core-theorem faction. THM-1 unique-at-6 identity. Leech lattice. Sealed n6 signature.

rp_spectrum_derivation.method: rp_bonus * anima_seed_multiplier expanded into lambda_i spectrum
rp_spectrum_derivation.expansion: 13 factions x 13 seed multipliers = 169 raw lambda values (dedup + positive)
rp_spectrum_derivation.scale_target: log-range comparable to lens_spectrum 1575 hexa file sizes (log 2..12)
